FLASHMANIA

A time trial racing game — beat the clock!

W Accelerate   S Brake   A/D Steer

Space Drift   R Restart   G Ghost

Surfaces: Asphalt ● Dirt ● Ice ● Grass ● Plastic
Special: Boosters ● Engine Off ● Fragile ● No Steering/Brakes

Press Enter to start

Race Complete!

Press R to restart or Enter to continue
